claimCeiling: source-discipline edge VALIDATED by 3 independent judge families; NOT an AGI claim; canClaimAGI:false
headline: VALIDATED per the pre-registered gate: 3 independent judge families (qwen, mlx-community/llama-70b, deepseek) all favor the M3-SFT source-discipline adapter over base across 3 seeds — 9/9 seed×family cells Wilson95-exclude-0.5 — AND max pairwise inter-judge κ=0.4858 (qwen↔llama-70b) ≥ 0.40, clearing the reliability floor the 2-family run (κ=0.236) could not. Forced-choice removed the tie-asymmetry that deflated κ. canClaimAGI false.
ownerDecision: 2026-07-02: owner accepted VALIDATED with the transport deviations documented (see deviationsFromPreregistration).
judgesAsRun: deepseek:deepseek-chat (native DeepSeek API; resolved to deepseek-v4-flash)  [family deepseek]

gateEvaluation.preRegisteredVERDICT_VALIDATED: all 3 families' adapter win-rate CI-excludes-0.5 across >=3 seeds AND (>=1 pairwise kappa>=0.40 OR forced-choice majority-consensus reliability>=0.40)
gateEvaluation.how: 9/9 seed×family cells significant; max pairwise kappa 0.4858 >= 0.40 (qwen↔llama-70b: 0.4858/0.3857/0.4637 across seeds 1/2/3)
gateEvaluation.kappaHonestyNote: deepseek-pair kappas are prevalence-deflated (κ≈0.0-0.1) because deepseek agrees even harder (winrate 0.89-0.91, obsAgree 0.68-0.73) — Feinstein-Cicchetti; this SUPPORTS the adapter (all families agree) and does not lower the verdict since the qwen↔llama pair clears the floor.

deviationsFromPreregistration: qwen family served as Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct Q8_0 via ollama (reached over an SSH tunnel), NOT the pre-registered fp16 vLLM — vLLM is ABI-broken (torch/vllm undefined-symbol) on the aarch64 GB10 Spark this cycle. Q8 is a near-fp16 proxy; note this is the qwen judge that is IN the κ=0.4858 pair clearing the floor.

deepseek family via native DeepSeek API (DEEPSEEK_API_KEY), NOT OpenRouter (owner-rotated key unavailable). Same model+family (deepseek-chat, resolved to deepseek-v4-flash); family distinctness re-verified (3 distinct).
seed3 answer file (M3-pilot-answers-seed3.json) was missing from all git refs and recovered from the Spark ~/sophia-bridge (sha-verified identical generation batch as the repo's seed1/seed2).
A strictly clean re-run (fp16-vLLM qwen + OpenRouter deepseek) is infra-blocked (needs the Spark vLLM build fixed + a fresh OpenRouter key) and is recommended as later confirmation.

priorTwoFamilyResult.note: 2-family run: both families significant, 3 seeds, but κ<0.40 (deflation-bound). This 3-family forced-choice run resolves it.
